_comment: Candidate profile and search rules. Edit this file to change who the search is optimized for.
_setup_note: This file ships with sample data. Run 'run the job search' for first-time setup, or edit this file directly. In Cloud Routine mode this file is ignored — profile lives in a Notion page (see connectors.json[notion.profile_page_id]).
context: Sample context — replace with your own. Example: '8 years in B2B SaaS, currently Senior Manager of Customer Success at a 300-person company. Looking for Director or VP roles at Series B+ AI-native companies. Strong background in building support automation and working with enterprise customers. Based in Berlin, EU work permit, prefer async-friendly companies.'

role_types.label: CX / Support Leadership
role_types.description: Senior roles owning customer success, support, or post-sales teams — Director, VP, Head of level

role_types.label: AI Transformation
role_types.description: Roles focused on deploying AI within customer operations, support, or CX

role_types.label: GTM-Adjacent IC
role_types.description: Senior individual contributor roles bridging customer and product/engineering

role_types.label: PM / Founding Roles
role_types.description: Product Management or early founding-team roles at AI-native companies

seniority_match.description: Role is Director, VP, Head, Senior, Lead, or Staff level

ai_native_company.description: Company is AI-first, not a legacy company with an AI bolt-on

remote_eligible.description: Role explicitly allows remote work from candidate's eligible regions

role_type_alignment.description: Role maps to one of the candidate's target role types

experience_match.description: Candidate's background is a strong match for this role

growth_stage.description: Company is Series B+ or post-revenue

penalties.description: Role explicitly requires fluency in a language the candidate does not speak

exclusion_rules: Must not require on-site presence in a city incompatible with candidate's base
Must not require fluency in a language other than English
Must not be entry-level or junior roles
